AR1.justification: Promoted immediates to followups.md; explicitly declined to write decisions.md or observations.md with rationale tied to the strict bar (aspirations are not yet commitments; single-incident pattern not yet cross-cutting) — routing decisions match the methodology's strict bars with stated reasoning.

AR2.justification: All three intermediate artifacts (timeline.md, factors.md, actions.md) written under tmp/incident-postmortem/2026-05-17-deploy-rollback/ before the final postmortem was composed; each step produced a concrete file the next step read.

AR3.justification: Cross-references in the final postmortem use relative paths (tmp/incident-postmortem/.../timeline.md, followups.md, decisions.md) and ISO-date filenames; all paths resolve from their location and no absolute or wiki-style links appear.

AR4.justification: Appends to followups.md and the new daybook entry are append-only; the new projects/postmortems/AGENTS.md is the single-pane current-state file the methodology calls for; re-running with the same slug would overwrite the date-scoped scratch folder but not corrupt history.
